title: From School Stream to Career Switch: The Case for Lifelong Career Mentorship
excerpt: The 'One-and-Done' model is obsolete. Why successful professionals treat career mentorship as a lifelong partnership.
author: MyAarohan Team
content:
Imagine ISRO launching a rocket. Once it leaves the ground, do they turn off the computers? No. They track and adjust course. Yet, in education, we treat career mentorship as a "Launchpad Event" (Grade 10/12). This is the "One-and-Done" fallacy.

Why the Model is Broken

  1. You Change: Who you are at 15 is different from who you are at 25 or 35.
  2. The World Changes: "Safe" careers in 2020 are disrupted by AI in 2025.
  3. Quarter-Life Crisis: 60% of young professionals feel lost within two years of working.

The 4 Stages of the MyAarohan Journey

  • Stage 1: Foundation (Grades 8-10): Self-Discovery & Stream Selection.
  • Stage 2: The Launch (Grades 11-12): Precision Targeting of Degrees/Universities.
  • Stage 3: The Navigation (College to Corporate): Employability & Skill Bridging.
  • Stage 4: The Evolution (Mid-Career): Pivoting & Purpose. Helping you switch careers safely using transferable skills.

Normalizing the "Pivot"

The stigma of changing tracks is fading. Today, moving between fields shows adaptability. MyAarohan is the sanctuary for the Pivot. We tell you: "It is okay to change your mind. It is okay to outgrow your degree."

Stop treating your future as a checklist item. Start treating it as an evolving journey.
